ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-14-2005 CONTINUED TO FEB-01-2006 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). DEC-14-2005 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
